heading: Role of international financial institutions
label: 6302 Role of international financial institutions
text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall instruct the United States executive director to each of the international financial institutions described in to use the voice and vote of the United States to oppose any use of the institution’s funds to promote the acquisition of unsafeguarded special nuclear material or the development, stockpiling, or use of any nuclear explosive device by any non-nuclear-weapon state.section 262d(a) of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective 60 days after , see , set out as a note under .Apr. 30, 1994section 831 of Pub. L. 103–236section 6301 of this title
